title: Pricing Elasticity Lab
summary: Estimate elasticity, simulate price shifts, and quantify likely revenue tradeoffs by segment.
knowledge_base: Pricing Elasticity Lab is positioned as a Commerce starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Estimate elasticity, simulate price shifts, and quantify likely revenue tradeoffs by segment.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on pricing, causal, revenue.
